scripts.start: node scripts/with-env.cjs development -- npx expo start
scripts.start:temp-keys: EXPO_PUBLIC_DEV_TEMP_KEY_COUNT=36 node scripts/with-env.cjs development -- npx expo start
scripts.build:debug:local: node scripts/with-env.cjs development -- node scripts/android-local-build.cjs debug
scripts.build:debug:local:install: node scripts/with-env.cjs development -- node scripts/android-local-build.cjs debug --install
scripts.build:debug:local:clean: node scripts/with-env.cjs development -- node scripts/android-local-build.cjs debug --clean
scripts.build:debug:local:install:clean: node scripts/with-env.cjs development -- node scripts/android-local-build.cjs debug --clean --install
scripts.build:debug:cloud: node scripts/with-env.cjs development --sync-eas-env -- npx eas build --platform android --profile development
scripts.build:release:local: node scripts/with-env.cjs production -- node scripts/android-local-build.cjs release
scripts.build:release:local:install: node scripts/with-env.cjs production -- node scripts/android-local-build.cjs release --install
scripts.build:release:local:clean: node scripts/with-env.cjs production -- node scripts/android-local-build.cjs release --clean
scripts.build:release:local:install:clean: node scripts/with-env.cjs production -- node scripts/android-local-build.cjs release --clean --install
scripts.build:release:cloud: node scripts/with-env.cjs production --sync-eas-env -- npx eas build --platform android --profile production
